selections.name: Tambo's Sister
selections.reason: Racing well recently, won last start at this track and distance on a rain-affected track. Top pick.

selections.name: Alberta Bound
selections.reason: Resuming after a four-month break. Finished off last preparation with a strong win at Cairns.

selections.name: Carlando
selections.reason: Freshened since getting off the mark on debut at Cairns. Improvement likely.

selections.name: Red Light Power
selections.reason: Broke through last time at Cairns on a soft track. Harder here but has upside.

danger_horse.name: Persefono
danger_horse.reason: Last-start maiden winner who can measure up if she brings her best.

selections.name: Coppabella Road
selections.reason: Set the pace for much of the race last start and finished a close second at Cairns. Bold run expected.

selections.name: Golden Octavian
selections.reason: Can build on an encouraging effort two starts back. Drawn the rail and should get a good run.

selections.name: Office Politics
selections.reason: Racing well recently, narrowly beaten at Bowen last start. Right in this.

selections.name: Maximum Power
selections.reason: Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time. Still a factor for exotics.

selections.name: Breeches
selections.reason: Resumes. Showed good form last preparation and looks well placed against this field.

selections.name: Amber Affair
selections.reason: Recent form sound. Held ground to the line for 3rd at this track last start. Drawn well.

selections.name: Booming Belief
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and boxed on steadily for 4th at Cairns last start. Cannot be ruled out.

selections.name: Nicco Nota Fighter
selections.reason: Third in a small field at Cairns on heavy track last start. Tough assignment but has place claims.

danger_horse.name: Yes Ma
danger_horse.reason: Second in a small field at Maxwelton last start. Drawn the rail.

selections.name: Insta Worthy
selections.reason: Won well two starts back and followed up with a solid 2nd at Cairns. This race is well within his grasp.

selections.name: Krackacan
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. Edged out late for 2nd at Mackay last start. Strong contender.

selections.name: Hot Cocoa
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and won by 1.4 lengths at this track last start. Fitter again and a winning hope.

selections.name: She's A Sweet Star
selections.reason: Racing well recently. Returns from a let-up after a solid 2nd at this track. Has the right credentials.

danger_horse.name: Mister Doobee
danger_horse.reason: Second-up 2nd at this track last start. Worth plenty of thought.

selections.name: Armour Force
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick. Made ground from the turn to win at Cairns last start. Will be charging home late.

selections.name: Burraneer Buoy
selections.reason: Comes off a let-up. Won at this track last start in soft going. Might find this lot a bit smart but is capable.

selections.name: Colours Of Autumn
selections.reason: Recent form sound. 2nd at Cairns last start. Has top-three aspirations.

selections.name: Sweet Kisses
selections.reason: Struggled in the run home last start but capable of sharp improvement on previous form.

danger_horse.name: Going Nuclear
danger_horse.reason: Well placed and sure to prove tough to beat if he brings his best.

selections.name: Cifonelli
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. 3rd at this track last start and won at Canberra prior. Capable of a big finish.

selections.name: Khumbila
selections.reason: Racing well recently. 2nd at this track last start. Drawn to advantage and looks a solid chance.

selections.name: Ready Tiger
selections.reason: Made ground from midfield for 3rd at this track last start. Drawn well and is among the chances.

selections.name: Kirikan
selections.reason: 3rd at Cairns last start on a slow track. Capable of a big finish.

danger_horse.name: Nolan
danger_horse.reason: Likely improver second-up. Raced on the pace when 3rd at this track last preparation.

selections.name: Thirteen Under
selections.reason: On a three-run winning streak. Won strongly at Cairns last start. Hard to go past.

selections.name: Rashford
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. 4th at Gold Coast last start. Watch for him dropping on these late.

selections.name: Stadium Of Light
selections.reason: Second-up. 5th at Cairns on heavy track last start. Needs more time but has class.

selections.name: First Man
selections.reason: Second-up. Eased back early last start but worth including on best form.

danger_horse.name: Perovic
danger_horse.reason: Second run back. Must improve significantly but capable on his day.
